'''Gadget''' was the [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] assigned to [[Ton Phanan]] during his service with [[Wraith Squadron]]. Gadget remained with Phanan until his X-Wing was destroyed, leaving both pilot and droid without a vehicle. The [[Droid/Legends|droid]] was later transferred to Myn Donos when his own astromech, Shiner, was destroyed. The R2 unit's biggest mission was when he had to help [[Voort saBinring|Piggy]] infiltrate the modified [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Ession Strike|''Night Caller'']] onboard the ''[[Lunatic]]''; the plan worked and the vessel was seized.

==Appearances==
